title: hydrocotyle itatiaiensis
intro: Hydrocotyle itatiaiensis, also known as Brazilian pennywort, is a type of aquatic plant native to South America that has been used for centuries in traditional medicine. It is valued for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which are attributed to the presence of flavonoids and phenolic acids. The health benefits of Hydrocotyle itatiaiensis include reducing inflammation, improving cognitive function, and supporting liver and kidney health. Hydrocotyle itatiaiensis can be prepared as a herbal tea, tincture, or capsule, and is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
